issue.body:

AdGuard Base filter

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | no Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.adguard-dns.com/dns-query`
